code_review.name: Code Review
code_review.content: Please review this code for bugs, security issues, performance problems, and suggest improvements.

python_optimize.name: Python Optimize
python_optimize.content: Optimize this Python code for better performance and readability.

explain_simple.name: Explain Simply
explain_simple.content: Explain this in simple terms, as if I'm 12 years old.

translate.name: Translate to English
translate.content: Translate the following text to English.

image_prompt.name: Image Prompt
image_prompt.content: Generate a detailed, high-quality image based on this description. Make it cinematic with beautiful lighting.

bug_fix.name: Bug Fix
bug_fix.content: Find and fix the bug in this code. Explain what was wrong and how you fixed it.

writing_improve.name: Improve Writing
writing_improve.content: Improve this text for clarity, style, and grammar while preserving the original meaning.

summarize.name: Summarize
summarize.content: Summarize this content concisely, keeping only the most important information.
